## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] refactor / perf / style: no user-visible change
- [ ] chore / build / ci: tooling

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? Unit tests, manual steps, screenshots. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible
